title: Change of His Majesty’s Ambassador to Luxembourg: Joanne Olivier
body: "Ms Joanne Olivier has been appointed His Majesty’s Ambassador to the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg in succession to Ms Fleur Thomas. Ms Olivier will take up her appointment during April 2025.  Curriculum vitae  Full name: Joanne Elizabeth Olivier     Year Role     2022 to present  FCDO, Deputy Head of Mediterranean Department   2019 to 2022  Paris, First Secretary (Justice and Home Affairs)   2018 to 2019  Pre-posting training (including French language training)   2016 to 2018  FCO, Eastern Europe and Central Asia Directorate (Head of Ukraine Team)   2014 to 2016  FCO, Strategy Directorate (Middle East Policy Planner)   2011 to 2014  Pretoria, Consul South Africa and Consular Regional Operations Manager for Southern Africa   2009 to 2011  FCO, Defence and Strategic Threats Directorate (Counter Terrorism)   2005 to 2009  Attorney, Bergstan International, Gaborone, Botswana   2001 to 2002  FCO, Europe Directorate, (Gibraltar)   1994 to 2001  Barrister, Chambers of David Barnard, 33 Bedford Row, London      Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
